understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; completing a level requires all goals covered simultaneously, and completing all levels wins the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions attempted to shift only the currently selected piece by one grid step (using the pixel-coordinate system where each cell is 3 pixels), with walls/boundaries blocking or constraining movement depending on their collision behavior. If a pushable block was directly adjacent in the movement direction, the piece could push it so both shifted (provided space/constraints allowed). Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces; using CLICK on an object's exact on-screen/pixel position switched which selectable was under control, and subsequent MOVE actions applied to that newly selected piece.
